name: Marsirius AI Labs
summary: Marsirius AI Labs is an AI and breakthrough-technology company focused on healthcare diagnostics, AI-powered applications, and quantum research, with public products/initiatives including duAIcheck, GELA AI, SHEEP, Marsbot, and Quantact.

claims.claim: Marsirius AI Labs operates an official website at www.marsirius.ai.
